name: DCT Segment Priorities Matrix (Home / Work / Mobile)
description: Aberdeen Personal IT / DCT segment-priorities matrix cross-tabulating four technology categories (Computers & Peripherals, Networking, Productivity Apps & Services, Leisure & Entertainment) against three contexts (Home, Work, Mobile). Captures priority rankings with analyst notes — including desktop-CPU 2.2->3.6 GHz 18-month roadmap, Pentium 4 laptop impact, 2002 as a 'banner year for home networks' caveated on wireless usability, and 2003 PC/TV/stereo integration outlook.
